response.justification: Candidate has 12+ years of experience as a full-stack engineer across diverse industries, with strong expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, alongside backend languages like Java/Kotlin. Demonstrated leadership in architecture decisions, AI-agent infrastructure, and cloud-native development (AWS, Kubernetes). Active contributor to open-source projects and recognized speaker/workshop leader. Slight concern about alignment with current stack (Vitest vs. Jest) but offset by strong testing framework expertise.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, matching primary stack requirements
Deep expertise in cloud platforms (AWS), containerization (Docker/Kubernetes), and AI-agent development
Proven leadership in architecture, testing (TDD, Jest/Vitest), and cross-functional collaboration
concerns: Primary stack mentions Jest and Playwright for testing, but no explicit mention of Vitest (current job requirement)
Recent roles show heavy use of TypeScript/Node.js but less emphasis on Nest.js (primary stack requirement)
Limited direct experience with Kotlin/Java in recent roles, though listed as a secondary skill
